classes.description: The parent class for all progress bars.
A child element of .s-progress. It shows the user’s current progress to accomplishing a goal with a background color.
A child element of .s-progress. It’s used to describe what progress bar is tracking.
A modifying class applied to .s-progress. It changes the bar color from green to orange.
Modifier for an info progress bar. It changes the bar color from green to blue.
Modifier for a circular progress bar. It changes the bar to be a percentage of a circle.
Modifier for a privilege progress bar. It changes the bar color from green to a lighter green (for legibility reasons).
Modifier for a badge progress bar.
Modifier for a gold badge progress bar. Applied to .s-progress__badge.
Modifier for a silver badge progress bar. Applied to .s-progress__badge.
Modifier for a bronze badge progress bar. Applied to .s-progress__badge.
Modifier for a segmented progress bar
Modifier for a stepped progress bar
A child of .s-progress--stepped that’s a wrapper for each individual step.
A modifier .s-progress__step that adds visual styling to the active step.
A modifier .s-progress__step that adds visual styling to a completed step.
A child of .s-progress--step, the circle that might contain a checkmark if the step’s been completed.
A child of .s-progress--step that draws a line on the left side of a step.
A child of .s-progress--step that draws a line on the right side of a step.

parameters.description: This parameter communicates that element is displaying progress status that takes a long time or consists of several steps. (Source)
This parameter defines the minimum allowed value for the progress bar. (Source)
This parameter defines the maximum allowed value for the progress bar. (Source)
This parameter defines the current value for the progress bar. (Source)
This parameter sets the width of the progress bar as a percentage. The value is the aria-valuenow value displayed as a percentage.
